---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project.
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

# Problem
Describe the problem or opportunity clearly.

# Current Behavior
Explain existing behavior or why this is an issue.

# Why This Improvement Is Needed
Explain the value it adds to users/developers.

# Proposed Solution
Explain your proposed implementation approach.

# Expected Outcome
Explain the resulting enhancements and how they will look or behave.

# Additional Notes
Optional technical/contextual notes.
